data.name: Mistbound Hearts — Season 1
data.detailed_description:
The world of Mistsunder is broken. Shrouded by the Obscuran, a maddening, otherworldly mist, isolated pockets of civilization—known as Bubbles—struggle for survival. Travel between these realms is a perilous dance with insanity, a journey only the brave or the desperate dare to undertake.


But you are only a young man that works in the quiet hamlet of No Man's Landing. You never venture too far—your life a simple routine of serving travelers and scrounging for resources. But something is slowly waking within you. 


Mistbound Hearts is a dark fantasy visual novel that blends a richly detailed world with a mature, character-driven narrative. Your choices will not only shape relationships but will also determine the fate of those caught in the oppressive grip of this fantastic but unforgiving world. Filled with feuding houses to full blown conflicts between entire realms. And the ever-present threat of the Mist.


Key Features:

  • A World Shrouded in Mist: Explore the diverse cultures from the isolated Bubbles of Mistsunder, from the verdant fields of Virellia to the fiery wastes of the Kharum Caliphate. Uncover the secrets of the Obscuran and the civilizations it isolates.

  • A Tangled Web of Relationships: Navigate complex relationships with a cast of memorable characters. Will you stand by your childhood friends, or will you be drawn to the allure of charming outsiders. Your heart, and your loyalties, will be tested.

  • Consequential Choices: Every decision matters. Your words and actions will forge alliances, create bitter rivalries, and lead to multiple branching paths and endings.

  • Stunning 3DCG Artwork: Immerse yourself in the world of Mistbound Hearts with high-quality, uncensored 3D-rendered scenes that bring the game's most intimate and intense moments to life.

  • Mature Themes: This is a story for adults. Explore dark fantasy themes, complex moral dilemmas, and explicit, passionate encounters.

data.short_description: In a world fractured by a maddening Mist, every day is a struggle for survival, and trust is a rarer commodity than gold. You are a simple tavern boy from a backwater hamlet, content with your mundane life. But your life, and from those around you, are about to change.

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統: Windows 10 (64-bit)
  • 處理器: Intel Core2 Duo or better
  • 記憶體: 2 GB RAM MB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Nvidia GT 750 or better, AMD equivalent
  • DirectX: 版本：9.0
  • 儲存空間: 1 GB 可用空間
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統

mac_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: 10.10+
  • 處理器: 2.0 Ghz 64-bit Intel-compatible (Apple silicon supported through Rosetta 2)
  • 顯示卡: Graphics: OpenGL 3.0
  • 儲存空間: 2 MB 可用空間

linux_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Ubuntu 20.04 or later, the Steam "soldier" runtime, or a similar Linux distribution
  • 處理器: CPU: 2.0 Ghz 64-bit Intel-compatible
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL 3.0
